suites.bb72_smoke: Circuit construction and decoder smoke tests on BB72.
suites.bb72_crossing_compare: Crossing-local comparison of monomial-column and IBM-inspired biplanar embeddings.
suites.bb72_distance_decay: Distance-decay sweeps on BB72 using power-law and exponential kernels.
suites.bb144_scaling: Selected BB144 scaling points under local and distance-decay models.
suites.bb72_j0_sweep_crossing: Crossing-kernel J0 sweep for the theorem-facing BB72 sector.
suites.bb72_per_sweep_mono: PER sweep for BB72 single-layer embedding.
suites.bb72_per_sweep_bi: PER sweep for BB72 biplanar embedding.
suites.bb72_full_cycle_control: Robustness control using full-cycle geometry insertion on BB72.
